crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET POLICY Data POST to an image file (gif)
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert http $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"ET POLICY Data POST to an image file (gif)"; flow:established,to_server; http.method; content:"POST"; http.uri; content:".gif"; fast_pattern; endswith; content:!"__utm.gif"; endswith; http.host; content:!".tealiumiq.com"; content:!"snackly.co"; content:!"otf.msn.com"; reference:url,doc.emergingthreats.net/2010066; classtype:trojan-activity; sid:2010066; rev:17; metadata:created_at 2010_07_30, former_category POLICY, updated_at 2020_09_16;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET POLICY Data POST to an image file (jpg)
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert http $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"ET POLICY Data POST to an image file (jpg)"; flow:to_server,established; http.method; content:"POST"; http.uri; content:".jpg"; endswith; content:!"upload.wikimedia.org"; reference:url,doc.emergingthreats.net/2010067; classtype:trojan-activity; sid:2010067; rev:11; metadata:created_at 2010_07_30, updated_at 2020_05_21;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_category: Malware Command and Control Activity Detected
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET MALWARE [eSentire] Win32/GandCrab v4/5 Ransomware CnC Activity
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert http $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"ET MALWARE [eSentire] Win32/GandCrab v4/5 Ransomware CnC Activity"; flow:established,to_server; threshold: type limit, count 1, seconds 60, track by_src; http.method; content:"POST"; http.uri; pcre:"/\.(?:bmp|png|gif|jpg)$/"; http.user_agent; content:"Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 6.1|3b 20|WOW64"; http.request_body; content:"wfKD6iudumBkmp"; depth:14; fast_pattern; pcre:"/^(?:[A-Za-z0-9+/]{4})*(?:[A-Za-z0-9+/]{2}==|[A-Za-z0-9+/]{3}=|[A-Za-z0-9+/]{4})$/si"; http.content_type; content:"multipart/form-data"; startswith; http.header_names; content:!"Referer"; content:!"Accept"; classtype:command-and-control; sid:2025638; rev:4; metadata:affected_product Windows_XP_Vista_7_8_10_Server_32_64_Bit, attack_target Client_Endpoint, created_at 2018_07_04, deployment Perimeter, former_category MALWARE, malware_family GandCrab, performance_impact Low, signature_severity Major, tag Ransomware, updated_at 2020_08_25;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: MALWARE-CNC Win.Ransomware.GandCrab outbound connection
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET $HTTP_PORTS ( msg:"MALWARE-CNC Win.Ransomware.GandCrab outbound connection"; flow:to_server,established; http_client_body; content:"wfKD6iudumBkmpL8IRr",fast_pattern,nocase; metadata:impact_flag red,policy balanced-ips drop,policy max-detect-ips drop,policy security-ips drop; service:http; reference:url,www.virustotal.com/#/file/8163602357b51402b8e34b385b0228ac4a603e19c6c8006e1c7a7a8099450742/; classtype:trojan-activity; sid:47766; rev:1; )

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: INDICATOR-OBFUSCATION UTF-8 evasion attempt
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert tcp $EXTERNAL_NET $HTTP_PORTS -> $HOME_NET any ( msg:"INDICATOR-OBFUSCATION UTF-8 evasion attempt"; flow:to_client,established; http_header; content:"|C2|",fast_pattern,nocase; http_raw_header; content:"|C2|"; byte_test:1,>=,0x80,0,relative; metadata:policy max-detect-ips drop; service:http; reference:url,attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1027; reference:url,attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1140; classtype:non-standard-protocol; sid:38678; rev:3; )

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: SERVER-OTHER Squid HTTP Vary response header denial of service attempt
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert tcp $EXTERNAL_NET $HTTP_PORTS -> $HOME_NET any ( msg:"SERVER-OTHER Squid HTTP Vary response header denial of service attempt"; flow:to_client,established; http_header; content:"Vary|3A|"; content:!"|0D 0A|",within 250; metadata:policy max-detect-ips drop; service:http; reference:cve,2016-2569; reference:url,www.squid-cache.org/Advisories/SQUID-2016_2.txt; classtype:denial-of-service; sid:41379; rev:1; )

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert ( gid:119; sid:241; rev:2; msg:"(http_inspect) Content-Transfer-Encoding used as HTTP header"; metadata: policy max-detect-ips drop, rule-type preproc; classtype:unknown;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: (http_inspect) HTTP Content-Length message body was truncated
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert ( gid:119; sid:260; rev:1; msg:"(http_inspect) HTTP Content-Length message body was truncated"; metadata: rule-type preproc; classtype:unknown;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: (http_inspect) HTTP chunked message body was truncated
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert ( gid:119; sid:261; rev:1; msg:"(http_inspect) HTTP chunked message body was truncated"; metadata: policy max-detect-ips drop, rule-type preproc; classtype:unknown;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: (http_inspect) URI path contains consecutive slash characters
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert ( gid:119; sid:8; rev:3; msg:"(http_inspect) URI path contains consecutive slash characters"; metadata: rule-type preproc; service:http; classtype:not-suspicious;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: FILEEXT JPG file claimed
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert http any any -> any any (msg:"FILEEXT JPG file claimed"; fileext:"jpg"; sid:1; rev:1;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET INFO TLS Handshake Failure
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert tls $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HOME_NET any (msg:"ET INFO TLS Handshake Failure"; flow:established,to_client; dsize:7; content:"|15|"; depth:1; content:"|00 02 02 28|"; distance:2; within:4; fast_pattern; classtype:bad-unknown; sid:2029340; rev:2; metadata:attack_target Client_Endpoint, created_at 2020_01_30, deployment Perimeter, former_category INFO, signature_severity Informational, updated_at 2020_01_30;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET INFO Observed ZeroSSL SSL/TLS Certificate
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert tls $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HOME_NET any (msg:"ET INFO Observed ZeroSSL SSL/TLS Certificate"; flow:from_server,established; tls.cert_issuer; content:"ZeroSSL"; classtype:bad-unknown; sid:2031231; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2020_11_23, updated_at 2020_11_23;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: SURICATA TLS invalid record type
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert tls any any -> any any (msg:"SURICATA TLS invalid record type"; flow:established; app-layer-event:tls.invalid_record_type; flowint:tls.anomaly.count,+,1; classtype:protocol-command-decode; sid:2230002; rev:1;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: SURICATA TLS invalid record/traffic
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert tls any any -> any any (msg:"SURICATA TLS invalid record/traffic"; flow:established; app-layer-event:tls.invalid_ssl_record; flowint:tls.anomaly.count,+,1; classtype:protocol-command-decode; sid:2230010; rev:1;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: TGI HUNT HTTP POST to wp-.* without referer
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert http any any -> any any (msg:"TGI HUNT HTTP POST to wp-.* without referer"; flow:established,to_server; content:"POST"; http_method; content:"/wp-"; http_uri; http_header_names; content:!"Referer"; threshold:type limit, track by_src, seconds 60, count 1; classtype:bad-unknown;sid:2610312; rev:1;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: FILEEXT BMP file claimed
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert http any any -> any any (msg:"FILEEXT BMP file claimed"; fileext:"bmp"; sid:3; rev:1;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: FILESTORE jpg
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert http any any -> any any (msg:"FILESTORE jpg"; flow:established,to_server; fileext:"jpg"; filestore; sid:6; rev:1;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: TAG_LOG_PKT
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert ( gid:2; sid:1; rev:1; msg:"TAG_LOG_PKT"; metadata:rule-type preproc; classtype:not-suspicious; )
